key.name: workspace-indicator-position
key.summary: Which panel box to put the indicator in.

key.name: workspace-indicator-index
key.summary: The position of the indicator within the panel box.
key.description: 0 is the far-most position (left, center, or right). Higher numbers move it inward.

key.name: activities-button-mode
key.summary: How to handle the Activities Button.

key.name: enable-window-menu
key.description: A master switch to enable or disable all window titlebar context menu modifications.

key.name: visible-items
key.summary: The window menu items to display.

key.name: available-custom-items
key.summary: Pool of user-defined custom menu item labels

key.name: fix-lockscreen-black-screen
key.description: Forces the lockscreen to render the desktop wallpaper to fix black screen bugs.

key.name: font-desc
key.description: The Pango font description string for the lockscreen clock.

key.name: enable-timeout
key.description: If true, the lockscreen will delay fading to black.

key.name: power
key.summary: Only delay screen off when on AC power
key.description: If true, the screen will turn off when the device is on battery power.

key.name: time
key.description: Time in seconds before the screen turns off. Set to 0 to disable screen off delay entirely.

key.name: clock-weather-enabled
key.summary: Show weather next to the clock

key.name: google-calendar-handler-enabled
key.description: Hijacks the GNOME Shell calendar buttons to open Google Calendar in Firefox.

key.name: google-calendar-default-view
key.description: The view mode to open in Google Calendar (day, week, month, customweek).

key.name: temperature-warning-enabled
key.description: Master switch to enable or disable the temperature warning feature.

key.name: sensor-id
key.description: The stable identifier for the sensor. If empty, the temperature monitor will be hidden.

key.name: visible-threshold
key.description: The temperature at which the monitor appears in the panel.

key.name: warning-threshold
key.description: The temperature at which the fire emoji is appended to the label.

key.name: on-click-app
key.description: The .desktop ID of the application to launch when clicked (e.g., "org.gnome.SystemMonitor.desktop").

key.name: temperature-warning-position
key.description: Which box of the top panel to place the indicator in ('left', 'center', or 'right').

key.name: temperature-warning-index
key.description: The position within the specified panel box. 0 usually places it to the left of existing items in the Right box.

key.name: hide-screenshot-button
key.summary: Hide the Screenshot button in Quick Settings.

key.name: system-menu-apps
key.summary: Applications to show in the system menu.

key.name: system-menu-position
key.description: The index to insert the buttons: 2 is far left, 3 is after Screenshot, 5 is after the divide, 6 is after Lock, and 7 is far right.
